# Files, folders and paths

We explain the difference between absolute and relative paths, set up a clean project folder structure for the course, and open it as our working directory in Positron.

{{< video https://vimeo.com/1194354318/f0c8077b97?fl=ml&fe=ec >}}

```python
# Absolute path on Windows
# "C:/Users/yourname/Documents/skl401/data/gapminder.csv"

# Absolute path on Mac/Linux
# "/Users/yourname/Documents/skl401/data/gapminder.csv"

# Relative path (if your working directory is the skl401 folder)
# "data/gapminder.csv"

# Print current working directory
import os
os.getcwd()
```

## Exercises
